channel.title: Microsoft for Developers
channel.description: Get the latest information, insights, and news from Microsoft.

item.title: 【VS Code 1.112 Insiders】VS Code 1.112 内部人员
item.description: 【Learn what's new in Visual Studio Code 1.112 (Insiders) Read the full article】了解 Visual Studio Code 1.112 中的新增功能（内部人士） 阅读全文

item.title: 【March Patches for Azure DevOps Server】Azure DevOps Server 3 月补丁
item.description: 【We are releasing patches for our self‑hosted product, Azure DevOps Server. We strongly recommend that all customers stay on the latest, most secure version of Azure DevOps Server. The latest release, Azure DevOps Server, is available from the】我们正在为我们的自托管产品 Azure DevOps Server 发布补丁。我们强烈建议所有客户继续使用最新、最安全版本的 Azure DevOps Server。最新版本 Azure DevOps Server 可从

item.title: 【The Human Scale Problem in Platform Engineering】平台工程中的人性化问题
item.description: 【We keep doing this thing where we solve a problem, celebrate the victory, then realize we've created three new problems we didn't even know existed. Remember when manually configuring servers was the bottleneck? So we built containers. Great! Now we're orchestrating thousands of them. Remember when monolithic deployments were too slow? So w】我们不断地做这件事，解决一个问题，庆祝胜利，然后意识到我们已经创造了三个我们甚至不知道存在的新问题。还记得手动配置服务器曾经是瓶颈吗？所以我们建造了容器。伟大的！现在我们正在策划数千个这样的活动。还记得单体部署太慢的时候吗？所以w

item.title: 【Azure Developer CLI (azd): Debug hosted AI agents from your terminal】Azure 开发人员 CLI (azd)：从终端调试托管 AI 代理
item.description: 【When a hosted AI agent crashes, azd now shows you the status and streams live logs—right from the CLI. What's new? The azure.ai.agents extension adds two commands:】当托管 AI 代理崩溃时，azd 现在会直接从 CLI 向您显示状态并流式传输实时日志。什么是新的？ azure.ai.agents 扩展添加了两个命令：

item.title: 【Windows stack limit checking retrospective: MIPS】Windows 堆栈限制检查回顾：MIPS
item.description: 【Last time, we looked at how the 80386 performed stack probing on entry to a function with a large local frame. Today we'll look at MIPS, which differs in a few ways. ; on entry, t8 = desired sta】上次，我们了解了 80386 如何在具有大型本地帧的函数入口处执行堆栈探测。今天我们将了解 MIPS，它在几个方面有所不同。 ;进入时，t8 = 所需的 sta

item.title: 【What's New in Agent Skills: Code Skills, Script Execution, and Approval for Python】代理技能的新增功能：代码技能、脚本执行和 Python 批准
item.description: 【Code-Defined Skills, Script Execution, and Approval for Agent Skills in Python When we introduced Agent Skills for Microsoft Agent Framework, you could package domain expertise as file-based s】Python 中的代码定义技能、脚本执行和代理技能审批当我们引入 Microsoft Agent Framework 的代理技能时，您可以将领域专业知识打包为基于文件的技术

item.title: 【How VS Code Builds with AI】VS Code 如何使用 AI 进行构建
item.description: 【Learn how VS Code uses AI across its own development workflow with GitHub Copilot agent mode, automated testing, and AI-powered code review. Read the full article】了解 VS Code 如何通过 GitHub Copilot 代理模式、自动化测试和 AI 支持的代码审查在其自己的开发工作流程中使用 AI。阅读全文

item.title: 【Evolving DirectX for the ML Era on Windows】Windows 上的 ML 时代的 DirectX 演进
item.description: 【At GDC this year, we shared how machine learning is becoming foundational to real time graphics, and how DirectX is evolving to meet that shift across shader level and model level ML. ML is no longer a niche optimization or a postprocess trick. It’s increasingly embedded throughout the graphics pipeline, influencing how frames are generated,】在今年的 GDC 上，我们分享了机器学习如何成为实时图形的基础，以及 DirectX 如何发展以满足着色器级别和模型级别 ML 的转变。机器学习不再是一种利基优化或后处理技巧。它越来越多地嵌入整个图形管道，影响帧的生成方式，

item.title: 【Microsoft at JavaOne: Empowering Java developers to lead the next era of AI】微软在 JavaOne：帮助 Java 开发者引领人工智能的下一个时代
item.description: 【Java has powered some of the world’s most mission‑critical systems for decades and that’s a big part of why we’re excited to be back with the community at JavaOne 2026 (March 17–19 in Redwood City). At Microsoft, we get to work with Java teams every day: folks shipping at massive scale, running on tight SLAs, modernizing mature codeb】几十年来，Java 一直为世界上一些最关键的任务系统提供支持，这也是我们很高兴能在 JavaOne 2026（3 月 17 日至 19 日在雷德伍德城）上与社区重聚的一个重要原因。在 Microsoft，我们每天都与 Java 团队合作：大规模交付、按照严格的 SLA 运行、对成熟的代码库进行现代化改造

item.title: 【Agent Harness in Agent Framework】Agent 框架中的 Agent Harness
item.description: 【Agent harness is the layer where model reasoning connects to real execution: shell and filesystem access, approval flows, and context management across long-running sessions. With Agent Framework, these patterns can now be built consistently in both Python and .NET. In this post, we’ll look at three practical building blocks for】代理利用是模型推理与实际执行相连接的层：shell 和文件系统访问、审批流程以及跨长时间运行会话的上下文管理。借助 Agent Framework，现在可以在 Python 和 .NET 中一致地构建这些模式。在这篇文章中，我们将介绍三个实用的构建模块
